reasoning: XLK (tech) -1.98% leading SPY lower (-1.07%), while XLE (energy) rallies +1.4% — classic risk-off rotation. Defensive sector outperformance with tech weakness suggests flight from growth. XLF flat (-0.12%) lacks confirmation; otherwise risk-off would be HIGH confidence. Narrow tech-led sell-off with defensive energy support = bearish bias, medium-high confidence.

XLF: -0.12% (financials flat, not confirming risk-off strongly — would expect -0.5% to -1.0%)

Overall rotation: Risk-off is evident but incomplete (lack of financial confirmation reduces confidence to medium-high)
